title: Level 14: Form Validation
description: Galat data ko server par jaane se rokna.
guide:
Validation Attributes

  • required: Iske bina form submit nahi hoga.
  • minlength='5': Kam se kam 5 akshar hone chahiye.
  • type='email': Email format (@) check karta hai.
  • min='18': Numbers ke liye limit set karta hai.
